notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe grounds into a force out, fielded by third baseman Isaac Paredes. Josh Naylor out at 3rd. Brendan Donovan to 3rd. Connor Joe to 1st. Throwing error by third baseman Isaac Paredes.

notableEvents.label: Zach Cole walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Zach Cole singles on a ground ball to right fielder Connor Joe. Brice Matthews scores.

notableEvents.label: Cal Raleigh GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cal Raleigh grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Braden Shewmake to first baseman Christian Walker. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Cal Raleigh out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews reaches on a fielder's choice. Braden Shewmake to 3rd. Brice Matthews to 2nd. Braden Shewmake advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Eduard Bazardo.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe grounds out, second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Vázquez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Mitch Garver walks. Rob Refsnyder to 2nd.
